result.overall_summary: Application form for Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana-Gramin (PMAY-G) to apply for housing assistance under the rural housing scheme in Madhya Pradesh.. Fill in the details in the sections below. If any part is unclear, listen to the audio guide.

pages.document_purpose: Application form for Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana-Gramin (PMAY-G) to apply for housing assistance under the rural housing scheme in Madhya Pradesh.
pages.page_summary: This is the main application form for the Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana-Gramin (PMAY-G) scheme. It collects personal, caste, address, and eligibility details of the applicant to verify their eligibility for housing assistance. The form must be filled out carefully and submitted through authorized centers like CSC, E-Mitra, Gram Sevak, or Panchayat Samiti office.
pages.simple_explanation: This form is for people in Madhya Pradesh who do not have a pucca house and want to apply for government help to build a new house. You must fill in your name, caste, address, and other details correctly. The form will be checked by a government officer before approval.
pages.action_guide: Fill this form carefully with correct details. Submit it at CSC, E-Mitra, Gram Sevak, or Panchayat Samiti office. Keep copies of all documents you attach.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the form number as 'प्रपत्र-24(1/1)'
fields.why_it_matters: This helps officials identify the correct form.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of your Gram Panchayat (e.g., Village Panchayat 'Dhanipur')
fields.why_it_matters: This helps locate your village for verification.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of your Panchayat Samiti (e.g., 'Jabalpur Panchayat Samiti')
fields.why_it_matters: This helps officials know your administrative block.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your caste category (e.g., SC, ST, Minority, OBC, General)
fields.why_it_matters: This determines your eligibility for government benefits.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your title (e.g., श्री for Mr., श्रीमती for Mrs., सुश्री for Miss) followed by your name
fields.why_it_matters: This helps identify you correctly in official records.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your husband's or father's name (e.g., राम लाल)
fields.why_it_matters: This helps verify your identity and family details.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the head of your family as per SECC-2011 list
fields.why_it_matters: This helps verify your family's eligibility for the scheme.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your relationship with the head of the family (e.g., पत्नी for wife, पुत्र for son)
fields.why_it_matters: This helps verify your family structure and eligibility.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your TIN number as per SECC-2011 list (if available)
fields.why_it_matters: This helps verify your family's details in government records.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your 12-digit Aadhaar number (if available)
fields.why_it_matters: This helps verify your identity and link to government schemes.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your NREGA job card number (if available)
fields.why_it_matters: This helps verify your employment and eligibility for the scheme.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your Swachh Bharat Mission (SBM) ID number (if available)
fields.why_it_matters: This helps verify your access to sanitation facilities.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your Mamashah card number (if available)
fields.why_it_matters: This helps verify your family's details in government records.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your priority serial number as per SECC-2011 list
fields.why_it_matters: This helps determine your position in the waiting list for housing assistance.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your full name as per government records
fields.why_it_matters: This helps officials identify you correctly.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your full address including mohalla (locality), dhani (hamlet), or magra (local term for area)
fields.why_it_matters: This helps officials locate your home for verification.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of your village
fields.why_it_matters: This helps officials locate your village for verification.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the short name or code of your Gram Panchayat
fields.why_it_matters: This helps officials identify your Gram Panchayat quickly.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of your post office
fields.why_it_matters: This helps officials locate your area for verification.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the short name or code of your Panchayat Samiti
fields.why_it_matters: This helps officials identify your administrative block quickly.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of your district
fields.why_it_matters: This helps officials locate your area for verification.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your mobile number or a neighbor/relative's number if you don't have one
fields.why_it_matters: This helps officials contact you for updates or verification.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the full name of the person who owns the land where you plan to build the house (patta means land ownership record)
fields.why_it_matters: This helps verify land ownership for housing construction.

fields.field_name: Land Details (if not in applicant's name)
fields.what_to_fill: Write details of the land where you plan to build the house (e.g., type of land, location)
fields.why_it_matters: This helps verify the land is suitable for housing construction.
fields.source: यदि निर्माण स्थल की जमीन का पट्टा आवेदक के नाम नहीं है तो विवाद रहित प्रस्तावित निर्माण स्थल की भूमि (कृषि भूमि/आबादी भूमि) का ब्यौरा :- _________________________

fields.what_to_fill: Write your bank account number linked to CBS (Core Banking Solution) bank
fields.why_it_matters: This is where the government will transfer the housing assistance money.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of your bank branch
fields.why_it_matters: This helps officials verify your bank account details.
fields.example: स्टेट बैंक ऑफ इंडिया, रामपुर शाखा

fields.what_to_fill: Write the 11-digit IFSC code of your bank branch
fields.why_it_matters: This helps officials transfer money to your account correctly.

fields.what_to_fill: Sign in the space provided
fields.why_it_matters: This confirms that the information you provided is true and correct.

fields.what_to_fill: Write your name below the signature line
fields.why_it_matters: This helps officials identify who signed the form.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the date when you submit the form
fields.why_it_matters: This helps officials track when the application was received.
fields.source: सम्पूर्ण आवेदन ग्रामसेवक/ई–मित्र/टैग अधिकारी/पंचायत समिति को प्रस्तुत करने का दिनांक _________________________

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the person who receives your application (e.g., Gram Sevak's name)
fields.why_it_matters: This helps verify who accepted your application.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the father or husband's name of the person who receives your application
fields.why_it_matters: This helps verify the identity of the person who received your application.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the Gram Panchayat of the person who receives your application
fields.why_it_matters: This helps verify the location of the person who received your application.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the date when your application was received
fields.why_it_matters: This helps track when your application was processed.

fields.what_to_fill: The person who receives your application will sign here
fields.why_it_matters: This confirms that your application was received by an authorized person.

fields.what_to_fill: Please enter your details clearly here. (e.g. 'John Doe', 'Sector 5')
fields.why_it_matters: This info is essential for document completion.

warnings: Do not leave any field blank unless it is optional. Incorrect or incomplete information may lead to rejection of your application.
Attach all required documents (Aadhaar card, job card, income proof, etc.) as mentioned in the form. Without these, your application may be rejected.
Never share your full Aadhaar number or OTP with anyone. Use masked Aadhaar (last 4 digits) where possible to protect your identity.
If you are a woman head of the family, your name should be written first for housing approval.
If you have a pucca house already, you are not eligible for this scheme. Providing false information can lead to legal action.
Recovered 9 fields from layout that were missed by analysis.
Verification: Field 'Form Number' cites source 'Document title at the top' which was not in the retrieved guidelines.
[WARNING] Gram Panchayat Name: PAN must be 10 characters: 5 letters, 4 digits, 1 letter (e.g. ABCDE1234F). Format: ABCDE1234F
[WARNING] Aadhaar Number: Aadhar number must be exactly 12 digits (e.g. 1234 5678 9012). Format: XXXX XXXX XXXX
[WARNING] Applicant's Mobile Number: Phone number must be exactly 10 digits starting with 6-9. Format: 98XXXXXXXX
[WARNING] CBS Bank Account Number: Bank account number is typically 9-18 digits. Double-check with your passbook. Format: XXXXXXXXX to XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX
[WARNING] IFSC Code: IFSC code must be 11 characters: 4 letters, 0, then 6 alphanumeric (e.g. SBIN0001234). Format: XXXX0XXXXXX
[WARNING] Applicant's Signature: Signature must match your official records. Use thumb impression if unable to sign.
pages.original_markdown:
प्रपत्र-24(1/1)
(प्रपत्र -1(अ) नवीन आवास हेतु)

# प्रधानमंत्री आवास योजना–ग्रामीण का आवेदन–पत्र
(आवेदक द्वारा सहायता राशि हेतु आवेदन पत्र ग्रामसेवक/टैग अधिकारी/ई–मित्र आदि के माध्यम से)

ग्राम पंचायत _________________________ पंचायत समिति _________________________
प्रार्थी का वर्ग (अनु.जाति/अनु.जन जाति/अल्पसंख्यक/ओबीसी/अन्य) _________________________
(परिवार की महिला मुखिया के नाम से आवास स्वीकृत किया जावें।)

![img-0.jpeg](img-0.jpeg)

(पंचायत समिति के प्रशासनिक स्वीकृति आदेश कमांक _________________________ दिनांक _________________________ क्र.सं _________________________ के क्रम में)

पात्रता :– SECC-2011 के आधार पर तैयार की गई वरीयता सूची, जिन्होंने पूर्व में किसी भी योजनान्तर्गत आवास हेतु अनुदान सहायता प्राप्त नहीं की है तथा वर्तमान में पक्का आवास नहीं है)

1. आवेदक का नाम– श्री/श्रीमती/सुश्री _________________________
2. पति/पिता का नाम _________________________
3. SECC-2011 की वरीयता सूची में दर्ज परिवार के मुखिया का नाम _________________________ आवेदक का परिवार के मुखिया से सम्बन्ध _________________________
4. (ए) SECC-2011 में आवेदक का TIN No. _________________________ (बी) आधार संख्या (यदि उपलब्ध हों) _________________________ (सी) जॉबकार्ड नं _________________________ (डी) एसबीएम आईडी नं. _________________________ (ई) मामाशाह कार्ड नं. _________________________
5. आवेदक का SECC-2011 के अनुसार वरीयता क्रमांक _________________________
6. आवेदक _________________________ (यदि दिव्यांग है तो विकलांग का प्रमाण पत्र संलग्न करें)
7. पूर्ण पता (मोहल्ला/ढाणी/मगरा) _________________________
8. ग्राम _________________________ ग्रा.पं. _________________________ पोस्ट _________________________ पंस. _________________________ जिला _________________________
9. प्रार्थी का मोबाइल नं. _________________________ स्वयं का मो. नं. नहीं होने पर पड़ोसी/रिश्तेदार का मोबाइल नं. _________________________
10. पट्टा धारक का पूरा नाम _________________________
11. यदि निर्माण स्थल की जमीन का पट्टा आवेदक के नाम नहीं है तो विवाद रहित प्रस्तावित निर्माण स्थल की भूमि (कृषि भूमि/आबादी भूमि) का ब्यौरा :- _________________________
12. प्रस्तावित जमीन – चारागाह/जोहड़ पायतान/राजकीय भूमि पर अतिक्रमण का स्थल नहीं है।
13. सीबीएस आधारित बैंक का खाता संख्या _________________________ शाखा _________________________ आईएफएससी कोड _________________________ (पास बुक की फोटो प्रति संलग्न करें)
14. मैं/मेरे परिवार के सदस्यों ने पूर्व में किसी भी योजना में आवास हेतु अनुदान सहायता प्राप्त नहीं की है, व वर्तमान में पक्का मकान नहीं है एवं निम्न सुविधाएं मेरे पास उपलब्ध नहीं है :-
1) मोटर साईकिल डुपहिया/तिपहिया/चौपहिया वाहन/मच्छली नाव – नहीं है।
2) मेकेनाईज्ड तिपहिया/चौपहिया वाहन कृषि उपकरण – नहीं है।
3) किसान कैंडिट कार्ड, कैंडिट सीमा के साथ 50 हजार या उससे अधिक का – नहीं है।
4) परिवार का कोई सदस्य सरकारी कर्मचारी – नहीं है।
5) परिवार के गैर कृषि उद्यमों का सरकार के साथ पंजीकृत – नहीं है।
6) परिवार के किसी भी सदस्य की आय अधिकतम रुपये 10 हजार प्रति माह – नहीं है।
7) इन्कमटैक्स – नहीं देता हूँ।
8) व्यावसायिक कर – नहीं देता हूँ।
9) स्वयं का रेफ्रिजरेटर – नहीं है।
10) स्वयं का लेप्पडलाईन फोन – नहीं है।
11) स्वयं 2.5 एकड़ या अधिक सिंचित भूमि के साथ एक सिंचित उपकरण – नहीं है।
12) 5 एकड़ या अधिक सिंचित भूमि के लिए दो या अधिक फसल मौसम – नहीं है।
13) मालिक 7.5 एकड़ भूमि या अधिक, एक सिंचाई उपकरण के साथ – नहीं है।
14) किसी भी सरकारी योजना में आवास निर्माण हेतु मेरे परिवार के पक्ष में आदिनांक तक कोई स्वीकृति जारी नहीं हुई है अथवा कोई पक्का मकान आवंटन – नहीं है।
15. सरकार द्वारा नवीन आवास हेतु निर्धारित अनुदान सहायता राशि से मैं न्यूनतम 25 वर्गमीटर प्लिंथ क्षेत्र का नवीन पक्का आवास निर्माण अधिकतम 12 माह की अवधि में पूर्ण कराने के लिए वचनबद्ध हूँ। आवासीय अनुदान सहायता से अधिक होने वाले व्यय की व्यवस्था में अपने स्तर पर स्वयं करूंगा।

संलग्न :-
(1.) सीबीएस बैंक खाता पासबुक की फोटो प्रति। (स्वयं द्वारा सत्यापित)
(2.) प्रस्तावित जमीन से सम्बन्धित दस्तावेज की प्रति। (स्वयं द्वारा सत्यापित)
(3.) नरेगा जॉब कार्ड एवं आधार कार्ड की प्रति (यदि उपलब्ध हो)। (स्वयं द्वारा सत्यापित)
(4.) दिव्यांग हो तो प्रमाण पत्र की प्रति। (स्वयं द्वारा सत्यापित)

आवेदक के हस्ताक्षर
(नाम _________________________)

सम्पूर्ण आवेदन ग्रामसेवक/ई–मित्र/टैग अधिकारी/पंचायत समिति को प्रस्तुत करने का दिनांक _________________________
–: प्राप्ति रसीद :–
श्री/श्रीमती/सुश्री _________________________ पुत्री/पुत्र/पत्नी श्री _________________________ ग्रा.पं. _________________________ का प्रधानमंत्री आवास योजना–ग्रामीण हेतु आवेदन (प्रपत्र–1) मय फोटो एवं संलग्न विवरण दिनांक _________________________ को प्राप्त किया।

हस्ताक्षर प्राप्तकर्ता

\Radhey\e\Panchayat Samiti 2019-20\PMAY-G 2019\PMAY-G Prapatra.doc

\u092a\u094d\u0930\u093e\u0930\u094d\u09.title: Caste Certificate (MP)
\u092a\u094d\u0930\u093e\u0930\u094d\u09.description: Caste certificates in MP are issued by the Sub-Divisional Officer. Non-Creamy Layer status for OBCs must be updated every 3 years (MP Specific rule).

\u0906\u0935\u0947\u0926\u0915 \u0915\u0.title: Self-Declaration (MP SV-Ghoshna)
\u0906\u0935\u0947\u0926\u0915 \u0915\u0.description: In Madhya Pradesh, most services no longer require an affidavit on stamp paper; a simple self-declaration (Swa-ghoshna) is legally valid for income and domicile.

\u092a\u0942\u0930\u094d\u0923 \u092a\u0.title: Aadhaar Card (UIDAI)
\u092a\u0942\u0930\u094d\u0923 \u092a\u0.description: 12-digit unique identity. Mandatory for Samagra e-KYC. Never share the Full OTP or the full Aadhaar number; use masked Aadhaar where possible.

(\u0928\u093e\u092e.title: PAN Card (Income Tax)
(\u0928\u093e\u092e.description: 10-digit alphanumeric ID. Mandatory for transactions above ₹50,000 and for opening a bank account in India. Not mandatory for Samagra but recommended for business.

\u0939\u0938\u094d\u0924\u093e\u0915\u09.title: MP e-Uparjan (Farmer Reg)
\u0939\u0938\u094d\u0924\u093e\u0915\u09.description: The portal for MP farmers to register for selling Rabi and Kharif crops at Minimum Support Price (MSP). Land record (Khasra) linking is mandatory.

\u092a\u091f\u094d\u091f\u093e \u0927\u0.title: Aadhaar Card (UIDAI)
\u092a\u091f\u094d\u091f\u093e \u0927\u0.description: 12-digit unique identity. Mandatory for Samagra e-KYC. Never share the Full OTP or the full Aadhaar number; use masked Aadhaar where possible.

\u0906\u0935\u0947\u0926\u0915 \u0915\u0.title: Aadhaar Card (UIDAI)
\u0906\u0935\u0947\u0926\u0915 \u0915\u0.description: 12-digit unique identity. Mandatory for Samagra e-KYC. Never share the Full OTP or the full Aadhaar number; use masked Aadhaar where possible.

\u0906\u0935\u0947\u0926\u0915.title: Aadhaar Card (UIDAI)
\u0906\u0935\u0947\u0926\u0915.description: 12-digit unique identity. Mandatory for Samagra e-KYC. Never share the Full OTP or the full Aadhaar number; use masked Aadhaar where possible.

\u092a\u0924\u093f/\u092a\u093f\u0924\u0.title: PAN Card (Income Tax)
\u092a\u0924\u093f/\u092a\u093f\u0924\u0.description: 10-digit alphanumeric ID. Mandatory for transactions above ₹50,000 and for opening a bank account in India. Not mandatory for Samagra but recommended for business.

pages.document_purpose: This page is part of the Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin (PMAY-G) application form for new house approval in Madhya Pradesh. It includes certification by village officials and financial sanction by the Panchayat Samiti.
pages.page_summary: This page has two main sections. First, it shows a certification form filled by a Tag Officer or Gram Sevak confirming the applicant's eligibility for PMAY-G. Second, it shows a financial sanction order from the Panchayat Samiti approving grant money for house construction.
pages.translation: This page is for official use only. It certifies that the applicant is eligible for the Prime Minister's Rural Housing Scheme (PMAY-G). The Panchayat Samiti approves financial assistance for house construction.
pages.simple_explanation: This page is for government workers to fill out. It proves you qualify for a government house grant. The Panchayat Samiti approves money for your house.
pages.action_guide: You do not fill this page. Only government workers fill this page after checking your documents. If you are a government worker, follow the instructions to certify or approve the application.

fields.what_to_fill: Leave this blank. This is for office use only.
fields.why_it_matters: This section is for government workers to write notes.
fields.example: No example needed. Do not write anything here.

fields.what_to_fill: Leave this blank. This is the form number.
fields.why_it_matters: This is the form number for tracking.
fields.example: No example needed. Do not write anything here.

fields.field_name: ग्राम सेवक अथवा आवास हेतु नियुक्त टैग अधिकारी द्वारा प्रमाणीकरण
fields.what_to_fill: Leave this blank. This is a heading for government workers.
fields.why_it_matters: This section is for government workers to certify your application.
fields.example: No example needed. Do not write anything here.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the full name of the applicant as per Aadhaar card.
fields.why_it_matters: This is to identify the applicant correctly.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the relation of the applicant to the head of the family.
fields.why_it_matters: This helps verify family details.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the applicant's category (SC/ST/Minority/OBC/General).
fields.why_it_matters: This is to check if you qualify for reservation benefits.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the TIN number from the SECC-2011 priority list.
fields.why_it_matters: This is to confirm your name is in the government's housing priority list.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the serial number from the SECC-2011 priority list.
fields.why_it_matters: This is to locate your name in the government's housing priority list.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the 12-digit bank account number linked to Aadhaar.
fields.why_it_matters: This is where the government will send your house grant money.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the bank where your account is held.
fields.why_it_matters: This is to confirm the bank for transferring money.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the bank branch where your account is held.
fields.why_it_matters: This is to confirm the exact branch for transferring money.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the date when the applicant submitted the form.
fields.why_it_matters: This is to confirm when the application was filed.

fields.field_name: Page Number in Gram Panchayat Register
fields.what_to_fill: Write the page number in the Gram Panchayat register where your name is recorded.
fields.why_it_matters: This is to confirm your name is in the official records.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the entry number in the Gram Panchayat register.
fields.why_it_matters: This is to confirm your name is in the official records.

fields.what_to_fill: Leave this blank. The Tag Officer will sign here.
fields.why_it_matters: This is to certify that the officer has verified your documents.
fields.example: No example needed. Do not write anything here.
fields.source: First signature line in certification box

fields.field_name: Name and Post of Tag Officer
fields.what_to_fill: Leave this blank. The Tag Officer will write their name and post here.
fields.why_it_matters: This is to identify the officer who certified your application.
fields.example: No example needed. Do not write anything here.

fields.what_to_fill: Leave this blank. The Gram Sevak will sign here.
fields.why_it_matters: This is to certify that the Gram Sevak has verified your documents.
fields.example: No example needed. Do not write anything here.
fields.source: First signature line in Gram Sevak box

fields.what_to_fill: Leave this blank. The Gram Sevak will write their name here.
fields.why_it_matters: This is to identify the Gram Sevak who certified your application.
fields.example: No example needed. Do not write anything here.
fields.source: Second blank in Gram Sevak box

fields.what_to_fill: Leave this blank. The Gram Sevak will stamp here.
fields.why_it_matters: This is the official stamp to confirm the certification.
fields.example: No example needed. Do not write anything here.
fields.source: Seal line in Gram Sevak box

fields.what_to_fill: Leave this blank. This is a heading for the Panchayat Samiti section.
fields.why_it_matters: This section is for the Panchayat Samiti to approve your application.
fields.example: No example needed. Do not write anything here.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the full name of the applicant as per Aadhaar card.
fields.why_it_matters: This is to identify the applicant correctly.
fields.source: First blank in Panchayat Samiti section

fields.what_to_fill: Write the father's or husband's name of the applicant.
fields.why_it_matters: This helps verify family details.
fields.source: Second blank in Panchayat Samiti section

fields.what_to_fill: Write the applicant's caste (SC/ST/Minority/OBC/General).
fields.why_it_matters: This is to check if you qualify for reservation benefits.
fields.source: Third blank in Panchayat Samiti section

fields.what_to_fill: Write the applicant's category (SC/ST/Minority/OBC/General).
fields.why_it_matters: This is to check if you qualify for reservation benefits.
fields.source: Fourth blank in Panchayat Samiti section

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the village where the applicant lives.
fields.why_it_matters: This is to confirm the applicant's address.
fields.source: Fifth blank in Panchayat Samiti section

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the Gram Panchayat where the applicant lives.
fields.why_it_matters: This is to confirm the applicant's address.
fields.source: Sixth blank in Panchayat Samiti section

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the Panchayat Samiti where the applicant lives.
fields.why_it_matters: This is to confirm the applicant's address.
fields.source: Seventh blank in Panchayat Samiti section

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the district where the applicant lives.
fields.why_it_matters: This is to confirm the applicant's address.
fields.source: Eighth blank in Panchayat Samiti section

fields.what_to_fill: Write the serial number from the SECC-2011 priority list.
fields.why_it_matters: This is to locate your name in the government's housing priority list.
fields.source: Ninth blank in Panchayat Samiti section

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the scheme under which the grant is approved.
fields.why_it_matters: This is to confirm which government scheme is funding your house.
fields.example: e.g., Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin
fields.source: Tenth blank in Panchayat Samiti section

fields.what_to_fill: Write the amount of money approved for the house grant.
fields.why_it_matters: This is the amount the government will give you for your house.
fields.source: Eleventh blank in Panchayat Samiti section

fields.what_to_fill: Write the application number and date of approval.
fields.why_it_matters: This is to track your application and approval.
fields.source: Twelfth blank in Panchayat Samiti section

fields.what_to_fill: Leave this blank. The Development Officer will write their name here.
fields.why_it_matters: This is to identify the officer who approved your application.
fields.example: No example needed. Do not write anything here.
fields.source: Thirteenth blank in Panchayat Samiti section

fields.what_to_fill: Leave this blank. The Development Officer will write their post here.
fields.why_it_matters: This is to identify the officer who approved your application.
fields.example: No example needed. Do not write anything here.
fields.source: Fourteenth blank in Panchayat Samiti section

warnings: This page is for government workers only. Do not fill it yourself.
If you give wrong information, you may face legal action.
The government will check your documents carefully before approving your house grant.
Verification: Field 'केवल कार्यालय उपयोग हेतु' cites source 'Page title line 1' which was not in the retrieved guidelines.
[WARNING] Bank Account Number: Bank account number is typically 9-18 digits. Double-check with your passbook. Format: XXXXXXXXX to XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX
[WARNING] Page Number in Gram Panchayat Register: PAN must be 10 characters: 5 letters, 4 digits, 1 letter (e.g. ABCDE1234F). Format: ABCDE1234F
[WARNING] Signature of Tag Officer: Signature must match your official records. Use thumb impression if unable to sign.
pages.original_markdown:
नोट :- उक्त आवेदन पत्र CSC/E-Mitra केन्द्र, टैग अधिकारी, कार्यालय ग्राम पंचायत अथवा कार्यालय पंचायत समिति में से किसी भी एक जगह जमा कराया जा सकेगा। शिकायत/समस्या हेतु पंचायत समिति/जिला परिषद् कार्यालय अथवा राज्य स्तरीय मोबाइल नम्बर 9116057308 पर Whatsapp/SMS/phone करें।

# केवल कार्यालय उपयोग हेतु

प्रपत्र—24(1/2)
(प्रपत्र —1(ब) नवीन आवास हेतु स्वीकृति)

## ग्राम सेवक अथवा आवास हेतु नियुक्त टैग अधिकारी (पंचायत/प्रगति/उद्योग प्रसार अधिकारी, एईएन, जेईएन, जेटीए, ग्राम रोजगार सहायक आदि अन्य राजकीय कर्मचारी/अधिकारी) द्वारा आवास स्वीकृति हेतु प्रमाणीकरण

प्रमाणित किया जाता है कि श्रीमती/श्री/सुश्री ………………………………………… पत्नी/पिता/पुत्री …………………………वर्ग (अनु. जाति/अनु.जन जाति/अल्पसंख्यक/ओबीसी/अन्य) …………………… SECC-2011 वरीयता सूची TIN NO ………………का नाम SECC-2011 वरीयता सूची क्रमांक …………………………… पर दर्ज है। सीबीएस आधारित बैंक खाता संख्या …………………… (बैंक) ………………………… शाखा ………………………… में हैं। प्रार्थी द्वारा आवेदन पत्र प्रस्तुत करने की दिनांक ……………… तक आवेदक का कोई पक्का आवास नहीं है। पूर्व में किसी भी राज्य/केन्द्र प्रवर्तित योजना में आवास हेतु अनुदान सहायता प्राप्त नहीं की है साथ ही बिन्दु संख्या 14 में अंकित समस्त शर्तों का सत्यापन कर लिया गया है। प्रार्थी प्रधानमंत्री आवास योजना—ग्रामीण हेतु पात्र हैं। आवेदन मय फोटो एवं सलंग्न दस्तावेजों की एक—एक फोटो प्रति ग्राम पंचायत की पत्रावली में रख ली है एवं ग्राम पंचायत के रजिस्टर के पृष्ठ संख्या ………………पर क्र.सं ……………… पर नाम दर्ज कर लिया है। फोटो सहित मूल आवेदन (प्रपत्र—1) एवं सलंग्न दस्तावेजों को पंचायत समिति में स्वीकृति हेतु प्रस्तुत कर दिया है। आवास निर्माण हेतु प्रस्तावित जमीन चरागाह/जोहड़, पायतन/राजकीय भूमि पर अतिक्रमण का स्थल नहीं हैं। प्रार्थी का फोटो व हस्ताक्षर प्रमाणित किये जाते हैं।

(भूमिहीन पात्र लाभार्थियों की स्वीकृती जारी कर आवासीय भूमि उपलब्ध कराने की नियमानुसार कार्यवाही की जावें। अपात्र के लिए लाल स्याही से मोटे अक्षरों में नोट अंकित कर दिनांक सहित हस्ताक्षर करें)

|  हस्ताक्षर टैग अधिकारी
(पंचायत/प्रगति/उद्योग प्रसार अधिकारी, एईएन, जेईएन, जेटीए, ग्राम रोजगार सहायक आदि अन्य राजकीय कर्मचारी/अधिकारी)
नाम व पद:……………………………………………………………………………………………………… | हस्ताक्षर ग्राम सेवक पदेन सचिव
(नाम …………………………………………)
सील  |
| --- | --- |

---

### कार्यालय पंचायत समिति

श्री/श्रीमती ………………………………………… पिता/पति ………………………………………… जाति ………………………………………… वर्ग ………………………………………… निवासी ग्राम ………………………………………… ग्राम पंचायत ………………………………………… पंचायत समिति ………………………………………… जिला ………………………………………… SECC-2011 वरीयता सूची क्रमांक …………………………के आवेदन पत्र एवं ग्राम सेवक की प्राप्त रिपोर्ट, मूल आवेदन (प्रपत्र—1) फोटो सहित संलग्न दस्तावेज के आधार पर ………………………… योजना के अन्तर्गत राशि रु. …………………………की अनुदान सहायता की वित्तीय स्वीकृति एतद् द्वारा प्रदान की जाती है। मूल आवेदन पत्र का Aawas Soft पर Registration कर दस्तावेज पंचायत समिति की पत्रावली में रख लिये गये है एवं पंचायत समिति के रिकार्ड व रजिस्टर में विवरण दर्ज कर लिया है ।

क्रमांक:/दिनांक…………………………

विकास अधिकारी
पं. सं………………………………………………………………………………………………………

---

### नोट :-

1. आवेदक के अपात्र पाये जाने पर प्रशासनिक स्वीकृति निरस्त कर आवेदक को सूचित जावेंगा।
2. पंचायत समिति द्वारा स्वीकृति के साथ महात्मा गांधी नरेगा की मस्टररोल जारी की जावेगी एवं कार्य शुरू करने के पश्चात् प्रथम किश्त की राशि लाभार्थी के बचत खाते में जमा होने की तिथि के तत्काल बाद न्यूनतम 25 वर्ग मीटर प्लिंथ क्षेत्र का नवीन पक्का आवास निर्माण कार्य अधिकतम 12 माह की अवधि में पूर्ण करना होगा।

\\Radhey\w\Panchayat Samiti 2019-20\PMAY-G 2019\PMAY-G Prapatra.doc

\u0915\u0947\u0935\u0932 \u0915\u093e\u0.title: MP e-Uparjan (Farmer Reg)
\u0915\u0947\u0935\u0932 \u0915\u093e\u0.description: The portal for MP farmers to register for selling Rabi and Kharif crops at Minimum Support Price (MSP). Land record (Khasra) linking is mandatory.

\u0915\u093e\u0930\u094d\u092f\u093e\u09.title: PAN Card (Income Tax)
\u0915\u093e\u0930\u094d\u092f\u093e\u09.description: 10-digit alphanumeric ID. Mandatory for transactions above ₹50,000 and for opening a bank account in India. Not mandatory for Samagra but recommended for business.

pages.document_purpose: This page is a utility certificate for the second installment of housing grant under Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana-Gramin (PMAY-G) in Madhya Pradesh. It certifies that the first installment was used correctly for house construction.
pages.page_summary: This page is a legal declaration for the second installment of housing grant. It confirms that the first installment was used properly for house construction. The applicant must sign and get it verified by a government officer. The page also includes office details for the Panchayat Samiti.
pages.simple_explanation: This is a legal paper. You must sign it to get the next payment for your house. A government officer must check and sign it too. If you lie, you can get in big trouble.
pages.action_guide:
1. Fill all blanks with correct details.
2. Get your house checked by a government officer.
3. Attach a photo of your house with you.
4. Sign the paper in front of the officer.
5. Submit it to the Panchayat Samiti office.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the form number as given at the top of the page.
fields.why_it_matters: This is the official form number for tracking.

fields.what_to_fill: Write whether the beneficiary is Mr or Mrs.
fields.why_it_matters: This identifies the beneficiary's gender.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the full name of the beneficiary.
fields.why_it_matters: This is the name of the person receiving the grant.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the beneficiary's caste category (SC/ST/Minority/OBC/General).
fields.why_it_matters: This is required for government records and benefits.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the SECC-2011 priority list number of the beneficiary.
fields.why_it_matters: This is required to verify eligibility under PMAY-G.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the village where the house is being built.
fields.why_it_matters: This is required to locate the construction site.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the Gram Panchayat.
fields.why_it_matters: This is required for official records.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the order number of the financial sanction for the first installment.
fields.why_it_matters: This is required to verify the grant details.
fields.source: जिला परिषद/पंचायत समिति की वित्तीय स्वीकृति आदेश क्रमांक

fields.what_to_fill: Write the date of the financial sanction order.
fields.why_it_matters: This is required to verify the grant details.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the serial number of the sanction.
fields.why_it_matters: This is required for tracking the grant.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the amount of the first installment grant received.
fields.why_it_matters: This is required to verify the grant details.
fields.source: प्रथम किश्त की हस्तान्तरित अनुदान सहायता राशि रु

fields.what_to_fill: Write the beneficiary's bank account number where the grant was deposited.
fields.why_it_matters: This is required to verify the grant payment.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the bank where the account is held.
fields.why_it_matters: This is required to verify the bank details.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the location of the bank branch.
fields.why_it_matters: This is required to verify the bank details.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the date when the grant was deposited in the bank account.
fields.why_it_matters: This is required to verify the grant payment.
fields.source: में दिनांक ... को जमा हुई थी

fields.what_to_fill: Write the date when the house was physically verified by the officer.
fields.why_it_matters: This confirms that the house construction is ongoing.
fields.source: मैंने लाभार्थी के आवास का भौतिक सत्यापन मौके पर दिनांक ... को कर लिया है

fields.what_to_fill: Write the muster roll number issued under MGNREGA for the construction work.
fields.why_it_matters: This is required for official records of the construction work.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the page number of the Gram Panchayat register where the certificate is recorded.
fields.why_it_matters: This is required for official records.
fields.source: ग्राम पंचायत के रजिस्टर के पृष्ठ

fields.what_to_fill: Write the serial number of the entry in the Gram Panchayat register.
fields.why_it_matters: This is required for official records.

fields.field_name: Date of submission to Panchayat Samiti
fields.what_to_fill: Write the date when the certificate was submitted to the Panchayat Samiti.
fields.why_it_matters: This is required for official records.
fields.source: पं.स. में दिनांक ...को जमा करवाई जा रही हैं

fields.what_to_fill: Write the name of the officer who verified the house and signed the certificate.
fields.why_it_matters: This confirms that the officer has verified the house.
fields.source: हस्ताक्षर ग्राम सेवक / अधिकृत टैग अधिकारी (केवल राजकीय अधिकारी/कर्मचारी) (नाम...)

fields.what_to_fill: The officer will stamp the certificate with their official seal.
fields.why_it_matters: This confirms the authenticity of the certificate.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the date when the officer signed the certificate.
fields.why_it_matters: This is required for official records.

fields.what_to_fill: Write whether the beneficiary is Mr or Mrs.
fields.why_it_matters: This identifies the beneficiary's gender.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the full name of the beneficiary.
fields.why_it_matters: This is the name of the person receiving the grant.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the beneficiary's caste.
fields.why_it_matters: This is required for government records.

fields.what_to_fill: Write the beneficiary's caste category (SC/ST/Minority/OBC/General).

fields.why_it_matters: This is required for official records.

fields.why_it_matters: This is required for official records.

warnings: Signing this paper with false information can lead to legal trouble. You may lose the grant and face penalties.
The officer must be a government employee. If not, the Gram Sevak will verify the certificate.
You must attach a photo of your house with you (size 6 inches x 4 inches) certified by the Gram Sevak.
The second installment must be used within 4 months to complete the roof and toilet work.

[WARNING] Gram Panchayat name: PAN must be 10 characters: 5 letters, 4 digits, 1 letter (e.g. ABCDE1234F). Format: ABCDE1234F
[WARNING] Beneficiary's bank account number: Bank account number is typically 9-18 digits. Double-check with your passbook. Format: XXXXXXXXX to XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX
[WARNING] Date of signing: Signature must match your official records. Use thumb impression if unable to sign.
pages.original_markdown:
प्रपत्र-24(2)
(प्रपत्र –2 द्वितीय किश्त हेतु उपयोगिता प्रमाण पत्र)

# (उपयोगिता प्रमाण पत्र)
## प्रथम किश्त का उपयोगिता प्रमाण पत्र

लाभार्थी श्री/श्रीमती ... पत्नी/पुत्र ... वर्ग (अनु.जाति/अनु.जन जाति/अल्पसंख्यक/ओबीसी/अन्य) ... SECC-2011 वरीयता सूची क्रमांक ... ग्राम ... ग्रा.पं. ... को जिला परिषद/पंचायत समिति की वित्तीय स्वीकृति आदेश क्रमांक ... दिनांक ...के क्र.सं. ... के द्वारा नवीन आवास निर्माण हेतु प्रथम किश्त की हस्तान्तरित अनुदान सहायता राशि रु ... इनके बचत खाता संख्या ... बैंक (नाम) ... स्थान ... में दिनांक ... को जमा हुई थी। मैंने लाभार्थी के आवास का भौतिक सत्यापन मौके पर दिनांक ... को कर लिया है, निर्माणाधीन आवास स्थल चारागाह /जोहड़ पायतन/राजकीय भूमि पर अतिक्रमण का स्थान नहीं है। नवीन आवास का निर्माण 25 वर्ग मीटर में कुर्सी स्तर तक पूर्ण कर लिया गया है।

इस प्रकार प्रथम किश्त की अनुदान सहायता राशि का पूर्ण उपयोग कर लिया गया है। अत: लाभार्थी को द्वितीय किश्त जारी करने की अनुशंसा की जाती है। निर्माणाधीन आवास का Geo Tagged फोटो प्रमाणित किया जाता है। उपयोगिता प्रमाण पत्र की एक फोटो प्रति ग्राम पंचायत की पत्रावली में रख ली है एवं ग्राम पंचायत के रजिस्टर के पृष्ठ ... पर क्र.सं ... पर दर्ज कर कुर्सी स्तर तक नव निर्मित आवास के साथ लाभार्थी का फोटो सहित उपयोगिता प्रमाण पत्र पं.स. में दिनांक ...को जमा करवाई जा रही हैं एवं महात्मा गांधी नरेगा अन्तर्गत जारी स्वीकृति के क्रम में उक्त निर्माण कार्य के विरुद्ध जारी मस्टररोल संख्या ... भुगतान हेतु जमा करा दिया है।

* मोबाइल आवास एप के माध्यम से Geo Tagged फोटो अपलोड किये जाने पर फोटो चिपकाना आवश्यक नहीं
कुर्सी स्तर तक नव निर्मित आवास के साथ लाभार्थी का फोटो (साइज- 6 इंच X 4 इंच) ग्राम सेवक द्वारा प्रमाणित

हस्ताक्षर ग्राम सेवक / अधिकृत टैग अधिकारी (केवल राजकीय अधिकारी/कर्मचारी)
(नाम...)
सील
दिनांक ...

नोट:– टैग अधिकारी राजकीय अधिकारी/कर्मचारी नहीं होने पर उक्त प्रमाण पत्र ग्राम सेवक पदेन सचिव द्वारा सत्यापित किया जावेगा।

---

## कार्यालय पंचायत समिति...

श्री/श्रीमती ... पिता/पति ... जाति ... वर्ग ... निवासी ग्राम ... ग्राम पंचायत ... पंचायत समिति ... जिला ... SECC-2011 वरीयता सूची क्रमांक ... के द्वितीय किश्त हेतु उपयोगिता प्रमाण पत्र एवं ग्राम सेवक की प्राप्त रिपोर्ट के आधार पर मूल आवेदन (प्रपत्र-3) फोटो सहित संलग्न दस्तावेज के आधार पर ...योजना के अन्तर्गत आदेश क्रमांक/दिनांक ... के द्वारा जारी राशि रु ... के उपरान्त द्वितीय किश्त की राशि रु. ... जारी करने की स्वीकृति एतद् द्वारा प्रदान की जाती है। मूल आवेदन पत्र का Aawas Soft पर प्रविष्टि कर दस्तावेज पंचायत समिति की पत्रावली में रख लिये गये है एवं पंचायत समिति के रेकार्ड व रजिस्टर में विवरण दर्ज कर लिया है।

विकास अधिकारी
पं.सं. ...

क्रमांक/दिनांक ...

नोट :- द्वितीय किश्त की राशि लाभार्थी के बचत खाते में जमा होने की तिथि से अधिकतम 4 माह की अवधि में छत का कार्य मय स्वच्छ शौचालय के पूर्ण कराना होगा।

\\Radhey\w\Panchayat Samiti 2019-20\PMAY-G 2019\PMAY-G Prapatra.doc

\u0932\u093e\u092d\u093e\u0930\u094d\u09.title: Ladli Laxmi Yojana (MP)
\u0932\u093e\u092d\u093e\u0930\u094d\u09.description: Educational and financial security scheme for girl children born in MP after 2006. Provides staggered payments and a final maturity amount at age 21.

\u0915\u093e\u0930\u094d\u092f\u093e\u09.title: PAN Card (Income Tax)
\u0915\u093e\u0930\u094d\u092f\u093e\u09.description: 10-digit alphanumeric ID. Mandatory for transactions above ₹50,000 and for opening a bank account in India. Not mandatory for Samagra but recommended for business.

\u0926\u093f\u0928\u093e\u0902\u0915.title: PAN Card (Income Tax)
\u0926\u093f\u0928\u093e\u0902\u0915.description: 10-digit alphanumeric ID. Mandatory for transactions above ₹50,000 and for opening a bank account in India. Not mandatory for Samagra but recommended for business.

\u0915\u094d\u0930\u092e\u093e\u0902\u09.description: 10-digit alphanumeric ID. Mandatory for transactions above ₹50,000 and for opening a bank account in India. Not mandatory for Samagra but recommended for business.

\u0936\u094d\u0930\u0940/\u0936\u094d\u0.title: Ladli Laxmi Yojana (MP)
\u0936\u094d\u0930\u0940/\u0936\u094d\u0.description: Educational and financial security scheme for girl children born in MP after 2006. Provides staggered payments and a final maturity amount at age 21.

\u092a\u094d\u0930\u0925\u092e \u0915\u0.title: Voter ID (EPIC - MP)
\u092a\u094d\u0930\u0925\u092e \u0915\u0.description: MP election identification proof. Mandatory for casting votes in State and National elections. Form 6 is used for new MP voters, and Form 8 for address changes within the state.
